ddls:
CREATE TABLE "protein_data" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each row */,
  "seq_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the sequence */,
  "protein_sequence" TEXT /* Protein sequence string */,
  "pH" INTEGER /* pH value used in the experiment */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the experimental data */,
  "tm" REAL /* Melting temperature (tm) of the protein */,
  "start_position" INTEGER /* Start position of the sequence */,
  "end_position" INTEGER /* End position of the sequence */,
  "sequence_length" INTEGER /* Length of the protein sequence */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sequences" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each row */,
  "seq_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the sequence */,
  "sequence_name" TEXT /* Name of the protein sequence */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the protein sequence */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experimental_conditions" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each row */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the experimental condition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experimental condition */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stability_data" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each row */,
  "seq_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the sequence */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the experimental condition */,
  "tm" REAL /* Melting temperature (tm) of the protein */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each row */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the researcher */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sequence_access" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each row */,
  "seq_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the sequence */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the researcher */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level for the researcher (e.g. read, write) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trails" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each row */,
  "seq_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the sequence */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the researcher */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the researcher (e.g. read, write) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the action was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each row */,
  "seq_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the sequence */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the researcher */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data contained in the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)
